title: Travel Itinerary for a Road Trip
scenario: Write a travel itinerary for a 7-day road trip from New York to San Francisco. The itinerary should include daily itineraries, accommodation information, and activities to do along the way. The prompt should be 300-400 words and cater to a mid-range budget.
constraints: Must include daily itineraries with activities and sightseeing.
Must include accommodation information (hotels, motels, etc.).
Must include estimated costs for fuel, food, and activities.

evaluationCriteria.description: Are the daily itineraries clear and informative?
Is the accommodation information accurate and relevant?
Are the estimated costs accurate and relevant?
